public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as inventory steward.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a inventory steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of inventory steward in and around Aurora Light Cathedral, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Light Cathedral workable through the obligations of inventory steward while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around Aurora Light Cathedral, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of inventory steward visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Working with Corin Vale can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Aurora Light Cathedral.
Corin Vale can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Corin Vale visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.
